data.title: Canada to Launch 'World First' Spot Solana ETFs With Staking This Week: Balchunas
data.description:
Canada has outpaced the U. S. with the launch of staking-enabled spot Solana ETFs as interest globally continues to build.
source: https://decrypt.co/314795/canada-launch-spot-solana-etfs-staking

data.title: Analysis: Some Ethereum inverse ETFs have risen sharply, and shorting ETH may become a hot trading spot this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that ETH has fallen nearly 51% from its January high, causing shorting ETH to become a hot trading spot in 2025, such as: 
1. The ProShares 2x Ethereum Inverse ETF (ETHD) listed on the New York Stock Exchange has risen 247% so far this year, making it the best performing ETF in the US market; 
2. The T-REX 2X Inverse Ethereum Inverse ETF has a return rate of about 220% since the beginning of the year. 
Analysts believe that 2025 may be cruel for ETH bulls because leveraged shorts are crushing them. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: Binance will perform wallet maintenance on BNB Smart Chain (BEP20)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will perform wallet maintenance on BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) at 14:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 17, 2025. To support this maintenance, Binance will suspend the recharge and withdrawal services of BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) at 13:55 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 17, 2025. The maintenance is expected to take 1 hour, and the recharge and withdrawal services will be automatically resumed after the maintenance is completed.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao Refutes Allegations of Ties to Federal Reserve
data.description:
Binance's founder, Changpeng Zhao, refutes claims of U. S. Federal Reserve connections during an X Spaces discussion.
source: https://coincu.com/332218-changpeng-zhao-denies-federal-reserve-ties

data.title: Emblem Vault CEO suffers Zoom conference phishing attack, $100,000 in crypto assets stolen
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News NFT platform Emblem Vault CEO Jake Gallen recently warned that the hacker group "ELUSIVE COMET" carried out attacks through Zoom video conferences, causing him to lose more than $100,000 worth of BTC and ETH. The attacker disguised himself as YouTube celebrity "Tactical Investing" and used Zoom's default remote control function to implant the "GOOPDATE" malware in the meeting to steal wallet credentials. Cybersecurity agency SEAL pointed out that the organization has stolen millions of dollars and often disguised itself as venture capital firm Aureon Capital to carry out attacks. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: GRPH rose above 0.0037USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 168%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows that GRPH rose above 0.0037 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.003705 USDT, and is currently quoted at 0.003703 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 168%. The current market value is approximately 3.5 million US dollars.

data.title: GSR Markets and Flow Traders are the two major market makers for WCT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, GSR Markets and Flow Traders are the two major market makers for Binance Launchpool's new coin WCT. Among them, 
GSR Markets: 7.5 million market-making tokens, 2.8 million have been deposited into CEX; 
Flow Traders: 7.5 million market-making tokens, and small transfer tests are being conducted to CEX. 
The market-making tokens of the two major market makers account for 8% of the initial circulation.

data.title: Verisense Network announces AItonomy launch on BNBChain, proposes AigentFi concept
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Verisense Network announced that AItonomy.world is launched on BNB Chain to promote the AI ​​Agent creator economy and put forward the concept of "AigentFi", echoing BNBChain's AI First strategy and Meme economy vision.
Verisense is an active blockchain based on fully homomorphic encryption (FHE). Different from traditional blockchains that rely on external oracles, it supports active data input and output, breaks the limitations of smart contracts, supports on-chain AI Agent deployment, cross-chain asset transactions and Web2 function integration. Verisense is becoming a key infrastructure in the dAGI route.
AItonomy.world is an AI Agent creation platform supported by Verisense. Users can create Agents through prompts and bind tokens (such as soul-bound tokens) to encourage content creation and interaction. The platform combines Reddit-style community mechanisms to reward users' content and interaction with tokens, turning meme coins into AI-driven assets with practical uses.

data.title: Zoom Security Concerns Arise After Crypto Theft Incident
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the CEO of Emblem Vault, Jake Gallen, has issued a warning to users of the video conferencing platform Zoom following a significant security breach. Gallen, who is also a podcaster and NFT collector, reported that a cybercriminal known as “ELUSIVE COMET” stole over $100,000 worth of his personal digital assets, including Bitcoin and Ether, through a sophisticated attack. The incident began on April 11, when Gallen experienced a complete compromise of his computer systems, resulting in the loss of his cryptocurrency holdings from various wallets. He revealed that the attack was facilitated through Zoom, where malware was installed on his computer during a call with a YouTube personality. This malware, identified as “GOOPDATE,” was used to steal credentials and access his crypto wallets. Gallen has been collaborating with cybersecurity firm The Security Alliance (SEAL) to investigate the ongoing threat posed by ELUSIVE COMET, who employs advanced social engineering tactics to deceive victims into installing malicious software.

Gallen recounted that the attack occurred during an interview arranged with “Tactical Investing,” a verified X account claiming to be the founder and CEO of Fraction Mining. During the interview, the other party kept their screen off, allowing the malware installation. SEAL's research indicates that Zoom's default settings enable meeting participants to request remote control access, which can be exploited if users are not cautious. NFT collector Leonidas confirmed these settings and advised those in the crypto industry to disable remote access to prevent unauthorized control of their computers. SEAL security researcher Samczsun emphasized the importance of social engineering in these attacks, noting that victims must be manipulated into granting access. Despite attempts to reach Zoom for comment, no immediate response was received.

The hackers also managed to access Gallen's Ledger wallet, despite his limited use and secure handling of the password. Additionally, they compromised his X account to target other potential victims through private messages. SEAL has identified ELUSIVE COMET as operating under the guise of Aureon Capital, a supposed venture capital firm, and attributes millions of dollars in stolen funds to this threat actor. The firm warns of the significant risk posed by their carefully crafted backstory. Users who have interacted with Aureon Capital are urged to contact SEAL’s emergency hotline on Telegram for assistance. This incident highlights the critical need for heightened security measures and awareness when using digital platforms, particularly in the cryptocurrency sector.
